title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at StudyIQ Education - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
StudyIQ Education invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Curriculum Developer at our Bhopal location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About StudyIQ Education:
StudyIQ Education is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Support students with special educational needs
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhopal, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with StudyIQ Education!
